MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey, via Zoom, for and with Debra Dolch, Petitioner.

The court summarizes the previous calling of this matter wherein the court agreed to a continuance to allow Howard Barntoff the opportunity to file written objections which he has not done, and he did not appear at today's hearing. The court offers its tentative ruling to take the matter under submission with the intent to grant it. Ms. Ebey points the court to her declaration on file specifically, regarding the request for extraordinary fees for Ms. Dolch.

The matter is taken under submission.

Appearances: Amanda Ebey, via Zoom, for and with Debra Dolch, via Zoom, Petitioner; Howard Bartnoff, via Zoom, in propria persona, former Personal Representative.

The court confirms with Mr. Bartnoff that he is requesting a continuance to allow to file an objection to the instant petition and reports that COVID related issues have prevented him from previously filing an objection.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jul-20-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court orders Mr. Bartnoff to formally file his opposition with the court on or before Jul-06-2022 and to provide notice. Any responses to the opposition are due by Jul-13-2022. Ms. Ebey requests that the court order Mr. Bartnoff to serve his filed opposition via email and U.S. mail. Petition To Approve Forensic Account Of Administrator Wwa For Period From April 12 2015 To November 27 2019
Off Calendar Oct-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey, via ZOOM, for Debra Dolch, via ZOOM, Personal Representative; Howard Bartnoff, via ZOOM, in propria persona, former Personal Representative.

The court at the outset asks Mr. Bartnoff if he has any additional information about the unidentified payments. Mr. Bartnoff reports that he has been dealing with his mother's death and that he has been attempting to obtain a continuance of this hearing. He requests a six-week continuance and advises that an accounting is not required. The court advises that an accounting is required.
